currentSegment.content: In a small village nestled between tall, misty mountains, a gentle breeze rustles the leaves of ancient trees. A young hero named Elara stands by a sparkling blue river, dreaming of adventures beyond her home. Today, she will take the first step on her journey to become a great warrior.
currentSegment.translation: Em uma pequena vila aninhada entre altas montanhas enevoadas, uma brisa suave agita as folhas das antigas árvores. Uma jovem heroína chamada Elara está à beira de um rio azul cintilante, sonhando com aventuras além de sua casa. Hoje, ela dará o primeiro passo em sua jornada para se tornar uma grande guerreira.
currentSegment.imageKeyword: A serene village scene with misty mountains in the background. Elara, a young girl with long brown hair and a simple tunic, stands by a shimmering blue river. Sunlight filters through the trees, casting dappled shadows on the ground, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

choices.text: Follow the river to explore the forest.
choices.intent: Elara will discover new friends in the forest.

choices.text: Go back to the village to gather supplies.
choices.intent: Elara will prepare for her journey with essential items.

choices.text: Climb the mountain to see the view.
choices.intent: Elara will gain a new perspective on her adventure ahead.

choices.text: Sit and relax by the river.
choices.intent: Elara will take a moment to reflect on her choices.

challenge.question: Qual é a forma correta de "Eu sou um guerreiro" em inglês?
challenge.explanation: A forma correta é "I am a warrior" porque usamos 'am' com 'I' no presente simples em inglês.
